title: Accessing Data
description: Query onchain state, subscribe to events, build indexing pipelines, and store blobs with Walrus.

title: Build and Test Move
description: Compile Move packages, resolve build errors, and run haneul move build.

title: Composable Functions
description: Design composable Move APIs with the right visibility, parameter order, and return patterns.

title: Frontend Apps
description: Build browser dApps with dApp Kit, from wallet connection to onchain queries and transaction execution.

title: Generate Agent Config
description: Generate a CLAUDE.md or AGENT.md file tailored to your Haneul project.

title: Install Haneul
description: Install and manage Haneul CLI versions, toolchain components, and network-specific builds with haneulup.

title: Modern Move Syntax
description: Write idiomatic Move with 2024 edition syntax: method calls, string literals, vectors, options, and more.

title: Move Project Setup
description: Set up Move projects, configure Move.toml and MVR dependencies, and troubleshoot build errors.

title: Move Unit Testing
description: Write and structure Move unit tests with proper naming, assertions, context usage, and cleanup.

title: Naming Conventions
description: Apply consistent naming to Move structs, constants, events, capabilities, and dynamic field keys.

title: Object Model
description: Model data with Haneul objects: ownership types, dynamic fields, collections, wrapping, and transfer rules.

title: Programmable Transaction Blocks
description: Compose multiple Move calls into a single atomic transaction with gas handling and sponsorship support.

title: Publish and Upgrade
description: Publish and upgrade Move packages on any network, from localnet testing to multisig mainnet deploys.

title: Haneul CLI
description: Understand Haneul networks, gas costs, epochs, and how the network operates at a high level.

title: Haneul Client
description: Configure the Haneul client, manage addresses, switch networks, request faucet tokens, and check balances.

title: Haneul Move
description: Write and debug Move smart contracts covering abilities, init functions, one-time witnesses, upgrades, and custom coins.

title: Haneul Overview
description: Learn what Haneul is, how it compares to other chains, and which Haneul Stack primitives fit your use case.

title: Haneul SDKs
description: Pick the right Haneul SDK for your language and wire it up: TypeScript, Rust, Python, Go, Dart, Kotlin, or Swift.

title: Walrus Sites
description: Deploy and manage fully decentralized websites powered by Walrus storage and onchain site objects.

title: Walrus Sites Portal
description: Run a local portal server to browse and test Walrus Sites on testnet.

title: Walrus Sites Publishing
description: Publish and update Walrus Sites using the site-builder CLI.
